electrical_mechanisms.ohmic_transport.description: A transport mechanism where current increases linearly with applied voltage, following Ohm's law.

electrical_mechanisms.schottky-type_tran.description: A transport mechanism where current flows through a Schottky barrier, typically observed in metal-semiconductor junctions.

electrical_mechanisms.space_charge_limit.description: A transport mechanism where current is limited by the space charge region in a semiconductor device.

electrical_mechanisms.direct_tunneling_t.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers tunnel directly through a potential barrier.

electrical_mechanisms.fowler_nordheim_tu.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers tunnel through a triangular potential barrier under high electric fields.

electrical_mechanisms.leakage_dominated_.description: A transport mechanism dominated by leakage currents, often due to defects or impurities, leading to non-ideal behavior.

electrical_mechanisms.recombination_gene.description: A transport mechanism where recombination and generation of charge carriers significantly influence current flow.

electrical_mechanisms.trap_assisted_tran.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers move via trapping and detrapping processes in localized states.

electrical_mechanisms.poole_frenkel_emis.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers are emitted from traps in the presence of an electric field, following the Poole-Frenkel effect.

electrical_mechanisms.thermionic_emissio.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers are emitted thermally from a material, typically observed in vacuum or semiconductor devices.

electrical_mechanisms.hopping_transport.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers move by hopping between localized states, often observed in disordered materials.

electrical_mechanisms.band_transport.description: A transport mechanism where charge carriers move through extended states in the conduction or valence bands of a material.

electrical_mechanisms.ionic_conduction.description: A transport mechanism where ions move through a material, contributing to the overall current flow.
